governance_gate_status.reason: Live discovery completed and the three outstanding manual confirmations (tag keys, swedencentral allow-list, same-region enforcement) were resolved by the project owner on 2026-05-11.

resolved_confirmations.decision: Emit all 9 discovered lowercase tag keys on the resource group and propagate to taggable resources.
swedencentral is allowed by JV - Allowed Locations for subscription 00858ffc-dded-4f0f-8bbf-e17fff0d47d9.
Resource group and all regional resources must be deployed in swedencentral.

tag_contract.casing_guidance: Use the 9 lowercase, hyphenated tag keys exactly as listed. Do not emit PascalCase or alternate-casing variants for the same semantic key.
resolved_sources: JV-Enforce Resource Group Tags v3 (project owner confirmation 2026-05-11)
JV - Inherit Multiple Tags from Resource Group (key list extracted from policy parameters)
JV - Inherit Tags from Resource Group (per-resource inheritance retained)
tag_contract.planner_action: Emit all 9 required tag keys on the resource group; propagate to every taggable workload resource. Do not invent additional tag keys or alternate casing.

related_assignments: Resource Group and Resource locations should match
location_constraints.planner_action: Deploy all resources in swedencentral. Set the resource group location to swedencentral and ensure every regional resource matches.

planner_constraints.planner_action: Do not add VM resources unless the SKU allow/deny parameters are resolved before planning.

planner_constraints.policy: Deny AKS deployment with agent pool count greater than 10
planner_constraints.planner_action: Do not add AKS for MVP; future AKS pools must stay at 10 nodes or fewer.

planner_constraints.policy: Deny VMSS deployment with instance count greater than 10
planner_constraints.planner_action: Do not add VMSS for MVP; future scale sets must cap capacity at 10 or fewer.
Do not use Azure OpenAI provisioned deployments unless an exemption is approved.
Keep Log Analytics/Sentinel commitment capacity unset or at 100 or below.

planner_constraints.policy: Deny Azure Key Vault Managed HSM with Purge Protection Enabled
planner_constraints.planner_action: Use standard Key Vault; do not deploy Managed HSM.
Block Step 4 until required resource group tag keys and casing are confirmed; then emit all keys on the resource group.

security_property_hints.policy: Ensure secure access to storage account containers
security_property_hints.planner_action: Declare blob public access disabled in workload IaC; do not rely solely on Modify remediation.

auto_remediation_ownership.planner_action: Do not duplicate this resource group in workload IaC.

auto_remediation_ownership.policy: Deploy Storage Account for Diagnostic Settings
auto_remediation_ownership.planner_action: Do not duplicate this diagnostics storage account in workload IaC.
Keep workload-specific alerts separate from subscription Service Health alerts.
Do not assume AMBA replaces workload-specific App Service, SQL, and availability alerts.

auto_remediation_ownership.policy: Configure Azure Defender to be enabled on SQL servers
auto_remediation_ownership.planner_action: Carry Defender for SQL behavior and any cost impact into Step 4 cost notes.
